description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the ruby:alpine Docker image and defines two stages: test and deploy. Add a markdown_lint job in the test stage that allows failure, runs `gem install mdl` then `mdl docs/`. Add a pages job in the deploy stage that runs only on the master branch, copies the docs folder to a public directory with `cp -r docs/. public`, echoes a deployment message, publishes the public/ directory as an artifact, and sets the production environment with URL https://nllgg.gitlab.io/dustpuppy.
